calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Allen Brandt, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MITCHELL JOHN COSTANZA ("Plaintiff").
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MICHELLE CHANG ("Defendant")
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Mitchell Costanza sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $14,000.89
Pre-Judgment Interest: $968.40
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,026.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $15,995.29
Plaintiff is awarded postjudgment interest accruing at the rate of 10 percent per annum.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Continued To May-20-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
